reviews.comment:
Buena atención, poca variedad de productos, estaría genial que ponga  GNC, igualmente pongo las 5 estrellas por el personal que fueron muy atentos los dias que estuvimos en el valle

(Translated by Google)
Good service, little variety of products, it would be great if they had GNC, I also give the 5 stars for the staff who were very attentive the days we were in the valley
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOXRyMUNREAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre vamos a desayunar. Tienen un menú de promos, unos combos muy ricos. Recomiendo el licuado de frutilla acompañado de sandwich tostado. Son muy amables

(Translated by Google)
We always go there for breakfast. They have a great menu of specials and delicious combo meals. I recommend the strawberry smoothie with a toasted sandwich. They're very friendly.
